proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the other recorded features, each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In an all-feature OLS model with `feature_025` represented by level indicators, the adjusted slope for `feature_041` was +0.1758 months of `pfs_months` per 1-unit increase (SE 0.00039, t=453.4, p<1e-300).
analyses.test: multivariable OLS main-effect coefficient

proposed_hypotheses.text: Compared with patients with `feature_025`=0, patients with `feature_025`=1 and `feature_025`=2 have lower mean `pfs_months`, with `feature_025`=2 showing the larger decrease.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted all-feature OLS model, `feature_025`=1 had -1.1956 months lower `pfs_months` than `feature_025`=0 (SE 0.00849, t=-140.8, p<1e-300).
analyses.test: multivariable OLS level-1 contrast

analyses.result_summary: In the same adjusted model, `feature_025`=2 had -2.3291 months lower `pfs_months` than `feature_025`=0 (SE 0.01194, t=-195.1, p<1e-300), a larger decrement than level 1.
analyses.test: multivariable OLS level-2 contrast

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043`=1 and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_001`=1 than among patients with `feature_001`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Adding a centered `feature_001` by `feature_043` interaction to the all-main-effects OLS model gave an interaction coefficient of -1.6324 months (SE 0.0181, t=-90.1, p<1e-300). Unadjusted subgroup means showed the `feature_043` difference was +1.656 months when `feature_001`=0 but only +0.027 months when `feature_001`=1.
analyses.test: OLS interaction adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043`=1 and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_015`=1 than among patients with `feature_015`=0.

Unadjusted subgroup means showed the `feature_043` difference was +1.480 months when `feature_015`=0 but +0.026 months when `feature_015`=1.
analyses.test: OLS interaction adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043`=1 and `pfs_months` becomes weaker as `feature_029` increases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint association of `feature_015`=1 and `feature_001`=1 with `pfs_months` is less negative than expected from adding their separate negative main effects.

analyses.result_summary: Adding a centered `feature_015` by `feature_001` interaction to the all-main-effects OLS model gave a positive interaction coefficient of +0.5124 months (SE 0.0162, t=31.6, p=2.44e-219), consistent with less-than-additive decrements.
analyses.test: OLS interaction adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_029` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_001`=1 than among patients with `feature_001`=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_050` and `pfs_months` becomes stronger as `feature_041` increases.

analyses.result_summary: Adding a centered `feature_041` by `feature_050` interaction to the all-main-effects OLS model gave an interaction coefficient of +0.00389 months per unit-product (SE 0.000773, t=5.03, p=4.88e-7).
analyses.test: OLS interaction adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: After a linear `feature_041` term and all other main effects, the centered-squared `feature_041` term is positively associated with `pfs_months`, indicating a convex relationship.

analyses.result_summary: Adding centered `feature_041` squared to the all-main-effects OLS model gave a positive quadratic coefficient of +0.000671 months per squared unit (SE 0.0000283, t=23.7, p=1.56e-124).
analyses.test: OLS quadratic term adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: After a linear `feature_029` term and all other main effects, the centered-squared `feature_029` term is positively associated with `pfs_months`, indicating that the negative linear association attenuates at higher `feature_029` values.

analyses.result_summary: Adding centered `feature_029` squared to the all-main-effects OLS model gave a positive quadratic coefficient of +0.0000186 months per squared unit (SE 0.00000135, t=13.8, p=2.99e-43).
analyses.test: OLS quadratic term adjusted for all main effects

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_025`=2 than among patients with `feature_025`=0.

analyses.result_summary: Adding a `feature_025`=2 by centered `feature_041` interaction to the all-main-effects OLS model gave an interaction coefficient of -0.01435 months per 1-unit increase in `feature_041` (SE 0.00108, t=-13.3, p=1.33e-40).
analyses.test: OLS interaction adjusted for all main effects
